one_line: Built+ran a per-incident pass@k breakdown tool ingesting A1(glm-5p2,42inc)+A2(deepseek-v4-pro,30inc) -> 72 incident-rows with pass@1/pass@k per condition and a solvability flag (7/7 unit tests pass): 64 solvable, 1 partial, 7 unsolvable; azure_ddos/cloudflare_waf/crowdstrike_bsod unsolvable under BOTH models, and 41 learnable-but-hard incidents (zero_shot p@1=0 but rex p@1=1).
